summary: Full end-to-end regression sweep of Brand Portal after Phase 53 (realtime quote-arrived notifications). All 26 backend API tests passed. UI testing verified all critical brand flows: login, catalog, notifications, queries, orders, account tabs, users, factories, allocations. No regressions found.

issues: Fabric cards use Link component but data-testid pattern 'fabric-card-' not found on clickable area - uses 'brand-fabric-card-link-{id}' instead

context_for_next_testing_agent: Brand portal fully tested post-Phase 53. All features verified working: (1) AUTH: login/logout/must_reset_password redirect working, (2) TOP NAV: All links present (Catalog, Queries, Orders, Users, Factories, Allocations), cart icon with count, notification bell with dropdown, account link, (3) NOTIFICATION BELL: unread count polling, dropdown with notifications, mark-read, mark-all-read, navigation to query detail, (4) CATALOG: 168 SKUs visible, filter options working (categories, colors, compositions, widths, GSM), search working, (5) QUERIES: 3 tabs (received/pending/closed) with counts, search, query detail with vendor quotes sorted by price, Best Price pill on cheapest, Contact Locofast CTA, (6) ACCOUNT: All 5 tabs working (Overview, Profile, Addresses, Orders, Financials, Activity Ledger), credit/sample credit tiles, AM contact card, invoice list, (7) ORDERS: Table with Invoice (blue) + E-way (purple) download buttons when invoice attached, (8) USERS: List with invite button, suspend/reactivate working, (9) FACTORIES: List with verification status, factory credit summaries, (10) ALLOCATIONS: Sent handoffs list, (11) SUPPORT FOOTER: Email + phone links present.

auth_journey.details: Login at /enterprise/login works, must_reset_password redirect works, logout clears localStorage and redirects to login

top_nav.details: All nav links present: Catalog, Queries, Orders, Users, Factories, Allocations. Cart icon with count badge, notification bell, account wallet icon

notification_bell_phase53.details: GET /api/brand/notifications/unread-count returns count, bell shows red badge when unread > 0, dropdown shows notifications with title/timestamp/url, click marks read and navigates, Mark all read button works

catalog.details: 168 SKUs loaded via /api/brand/fabrics, filter chips work (Availability/Category/Composition/Color/Width/GSM), search works, Request Sample / Order Bulk CTAs on cards

queries_portal.details: 3 tabs (Quotes received 2 / pending 5 / Closed 0) with counts, search by RFQ#/fabric/color works, NEW indicator on cards with fresh quotes

query_detail.details: Full RFQ spec card visible, vendor quote cards sorted by price, Best Price pill on cheapest, Contact Locofast to proceed CTA

cart.details: Cart page loads, shows empty state with Browse Fabrics CTA when empty

account_overview.details: Credit Limit tile + Sample Credits tile visible, credit lines table, linked factories section

account_profile.details: Read-only fields visible, brand_admin can Edit + save via PUT /api/brand/profile

account_addresses.details: Own addresses + factory-aggregated addresses with 'from Factory' badge, Add address button, set-default works

account_orders.details: Sample + Bulk grouped lists with PDP links per item

account_financials.details: AM contact card (Locofast Admin), 5-tile summary (Invoiced/Paid/Credit Notes/Debit Notes/Outstanding), invoice list with file_url download

brand_orders.details: Table with Documents column showing Invoice (blue) + E-way (purple) buttons when invoice attached

user_management.details: brand_admin can invite team members, suspend/reactivate works

factory_management.details: brand_admin can list factories, factory credit summaries endpoint working

support_footer.details: Support email + phone links present in footer

mocked_apis.razorpay: Razorpay verify can't run without real payment
mocked_apis.resend_email: Email sending via Resend is live (status=sent in email_logs)
